changes.description: Added Quick View overlay bar button with group-hover slide-up animation, conditional modal mounting for SSR safety
Added QuickViewErrorBoundary wrapping ProductView, loading/error states, accessible modal with useProductViewModal hook
Unit tests for Quick View button rendering, aria-label, click handler, product set/bundle exclusion, and wrapper structure
Unit tests for modal loading spinner, error state fallback, ProductView rendering, imageSize prop forwarding, and ErrorBoundary
Playwright E2E tests for overlay bar visibility, accessibility, modal interactions, navigation preservation, and mobile viewport
Architecture report documenting override pattern, component hierarchy, and SSR considerations
Risk assessment covering blast radius, upgrade compatibility, and performance impact
Change manifest documenting all files modified and test results
Human-readable feature summary with architecture decisions, commits, and known considerations
